dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6927 IH: Noise Oversight and Information for Safe Environments Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Menendez introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce

form.official-title: To amend the Noise Control Act of 1972 to establish a deadline for revising or supplementing noise criteria.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Noise Oversight and Information for Safe Environments Act.

section.header: Revision or supplementation of criteria related to noise
section.text: Section 5 of the Noise Control Act of 1972 (42 U.S.C. 4904) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (c), by striking criteria or;
by redesignating subsection (d) as subsection (e); and
by inserting after subsection (c) the following:

subsection.header: Review, revision, and supplementation of criteria
subsection.text: Not later than the date that is 2 years after the date of enactment of the Noise Oversight and Information for Safe Environments Act, and not less frequently than once every 10 years thereafter, the Administrator shall review the criteria published or revised under this section to determine whether it is necessary to revise or supplement such criteria. If the Administrator determines it is necessary to revise or supplement such criteria, the Administrator shall make such revision or supplementation in accordance with subsection (d).
